package_tier_list.notes: Three tier cards visible: Men's Team Hospitality, Women's Team Hospitality, City Events with distinguishing copy

per_tier_landing_page.notes: Each tier card has 'Explore' link suggesting per-tier landing page

dress_code_info.notes: No dress code mentioned on landing

tier_comparison_table.notes: Cards shown side-by-side but no feature matrix

upcoming_matches_pre_tier.notes: Matchday Hospitality section shows fixtures (Southampton, Brentford, Aston Villa) before tier selection

fixture_list_visible.notes: Fixture list with April/May 2026 matches visible

competition_filter.notes: PL/UCL icons shown but no filter control

sold_out_indicator.notes: All matches show Buy now; no sold-out state

buy_now_without_enquiry.notes: 'Buy now' buttons on fixture rows suggest direct purchase

saved_booking_in_account.notes: Sign in available but no booking visibility shown

package_tier_list.notes: Three tier cards visible: Men's Team Hospitality, Women's Team Hospitality, City Events — each with distinguishing copy and Explore CTA.

per_tier_landing_page.notes: Each tier card has a dedicated 'Explore →' button implying a per-tier landing page. Cannot confirm destination without clicking, but pattern strongly implies it.

dress_code_info.notes: No dress code information visible anywhere on the landing page.

tier_comparison_table.notes: No side-by-side feature matrix present. Tiers are presented as separate cards, not a comparison grid.

tier_capacity_indicator.notes: No min/max guests or per-box headcount stated on any tier card.

upcoming_matches_pre_tier.notes: Fixture list with April/May 2026 matches (Southampton, Brentford, Aston Villa) is shown on the same landing page as the tier cards, before any tier is selected.

multi_occasion_tagging.notes: No occasion-capture UI (birthday/corporate/etc.) present at this step.

price_per_person_visible.notes: No pricing visible on any tier card or fixture row.

fixture_category_tiers.notes: Competition badges (PL) visible on fixture rows but no Cat A/B/C pricing labels.

min_booking_unit.notes: No per-seat / per-table / per-box unit disclosure.

price_range_by_match.notes: No price ranges shown per fixture or by opponent demand.

total_cost_preview_pre_submit.notes: No running total or cost preview at this step.

deposit_vs_full_payment.notes: No deposit or payment terms visible.

corporate_invoice_billing.notes: No VAT invoice or PO/30-day-term option mentioned.

menu_preview.notes: Men's Team Hospitality copy mentions 'Fine Dining' but no actual menu preview is provided.

chef_attribution.notes: No chef or restaurant partner credited.

kids_menu.notes: No children's menu or child-friendly indicator.

meal_timing_visible.notes: No arrival or meal timing information.

fixture_list_visible.notes: Fixture list clearly shown with April 2026 (Southampton) and May 2026 (Brentford, Aston Villa) matches, dates, times, and Buy now buttons.

competition_filter.notes: PL competition badge visible on fixture rows but no filter/toggle control to filter by competition.

sold_out_indicator.notes: All fixture rows show 'Buy now' CTAs with availability notes; no sold-out state displayed.

availability_heatmap.notes: List view only; no calendar or heatmap.

enquiry_form_field_count_le_7.notes: No enquiry form present at this step.

immediate_confirmation_email.notes: Not evaluable at landing step; no form or confirmation copy visible.

accessible_booking_option.notes: No wheelchair/accessible-seating hospitality path explicitly offered.

buy_now_without_enquiry.notes: Three 'Buy now' CTAs visible on fixture rows (Southampton, Brentford, Aston Villa) suggesting self-serve purchase without enquiry-first flow.

phone_booking_option.notes: 'Make an Enquiry' nav link present but no phone number or explicit phone booking option visible.

live_chat_availability.notes: No live chat widget visible on this hospitality landing page.

response_time_promise.notes: No SLA or response time promise stated.

stadium_tour_inclusion.notes: No stadium tour bundled; City Events card mentions 'play on the pitch' but not a hospitality stadium tour inclusion.

car_pickup_or_transfer.notes: No transfer or chauffeur service mentioned.

pitchside_or_tunnel_access.notes: No tunnel-walk or pitchside viewing element listed in hospitality tiers.

player_meet_and_greet.notes: No player interaction guaranteed or scheduled.

seat_number_lead_time.notes: No seat number communication timeline stated.

dietary_preferences_capture.notes: No dietary preference capture at this step.

group_host_contact.notes: No group host contact or allocation protocol stated.

confirmation_page_clarity.notes: Not applicable at landing step; no form submission copy present.

receipt_download.notes: No self-serve receipt or VAT invoice download option.
